requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Zimbabwe does not appear to have a mature, dedicated public EV charging connector regulation in official sources as of 2026-06-14. For IEC-aligned procurement and international vehicle interoperability, AC charging should be assessed against IEC 62196-2 Type 2 couplers and DC fast charging against IEC 62196-3 CCS2 couplers, alongside IEC 61851 charging-system evidence. These connector choices may become mandatory when written into SAZ-adopted standards, ZERA / ZETDC project conditions, tenders, site-owner specifications, or charge-point-operator requirements.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，官方来源未显示津巴布韦已有成熟、专门的公共电动汽车充电接口法规。对于IEC体系采购和国际车辆互操作，交流充电应按IEC 62196-2 Type 2耦合器评估，直流快充应按IEC 62196-3 CCS2耦合器评估，并同时提供IEC 61851充电系统证据。当这些接口要求写入SAZ采标、ZERA / ZETDC项目条件、招标、场地方规范或充电点运营商要求时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，官方來源未顯示辛巴威已有成熟、專門的公共電動汽車充電接口法規。對於IEC體系採購和國際車輛互操作，交流充電應按IEC 62196-2 Type 2耦合器評估，直流快充應按IEC 62196-3 CCS2耦合器評估，並同時提供IEC 61851充電系統證據。當這些接口要求寫入SAZ採標、ZERA / ZETDC項目條件、招標、場地方規範或充電點運營商要求時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler resembles IEC 62196 Type 2, connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangements differ. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use GB/T 27930 CAN communication, which is not the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形类似IEC 62196 Type 2，但接口性别、信号和触点排列均不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2几何形状不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形類似IEC 62196 Type 2，但接口性別、信號和觸點排列均不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2幾何形狀不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 deployments in Zimbabwe. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack, labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于津巴布韦IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、测试报告、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。不应将转接器视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於辛巴威IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。不應將轉接器視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by SAZ-adopted standard, ZERA / ZETDC project condition, tender, site owner, or network operator; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes direct substitution impossible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. For Zimbabwe projects using IEC-aligned vehicles or tenders, confirm IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。对于采用IEC体系车辆或招标要求的津巴布韦项目，应在报价、贴标或发货前确认交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。對於採用IEC體系車輛或招標要求的辛巴威項目，應在報價、貼標或發貨前確認交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。
